title: OutputCommitterFactory
description: The OutputCommitterFactory is responsible for creating and managing committers for different filesystems and schemas. It collaborates with the PathOutputCommitterFactory, FileOutputCommitterFactory, and NamedCommitterFactory classes to provide a centralized location for committers to be created and used by the FileOutputFormat. The OutputCommitterFactory follows the factory pattern, as it provides a way to create committers based on different criteria. It also follows the singleton pattern, as there is only one instance of the OutputCommitterFactory per JVM.

DESCRIPTION:
The OutputCommitterFactory is responsible for creating and managing committers for different filesystems and schemas. It collaborates with the PathOutputCommitterFactory, FileOutputCommitterFactory, and NamedCommitterFactory classes to provide a centralized location for committers to be created and used by the FileOutputFormat. The OutputCommitterFactory follows the factory pattern, as it provides a way to create committers based on different criteria. It also follows the singleton pattern, as there is only one instance of the OutputCommitterFactory per JVM.
